title: From sterilisation to wellness - Vitalvet Mossel Bay puts pet health first
description: BUSINESS NEWS - Nestled in the heart of...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"Sponsored Content","html":"Sponsored Content"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"BUSINESS NEWS - Nestled in the heart of Mossel Bay, on the corner of Spring and Church Street, Vitalvet Mossel Bay is your go-to destination for the very best in animal health and wellness.","html":"BUSINESS NEWS - Nestled in the heart of Mossel Bay, on the corner of Spring and Church Street, Vitalvet Mossel Bay is your go-to destination for the very best in animal health and wellness."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Among many services the veterinary practice offers, Vitalvet also focuses on sterilisation, an often underestimated and important step in ensuring your pet’s health."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Vitalvet offers a free pre-spay or pre-castration check to assess each animal thoroughly and ensure all important aspects and benefits are discussed.","html":"Vitalvet offers a free pre-spay or pre-castration check to assess each animal thoroughly and ensure all important aspects and benefits are discussed."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Vitalvet has a fully equipped theatre and a qualified veterinary nurse to assist the veterinarian and provide the best possible care for their four-legged clients.","html":"Vitalvet has a fully equipped theatre and a qualified veterinary nurse to assist the veterinarian and provide the best possible care for their four-legged clients."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Animals are brought in on the morning of the procedure and go home the same day after ensuring they are fully recovered and received all necessary medication.","html":"Animals are brought in on the morning of the procedure and go home the same day after ensuring they are fully recovered and received all necessary medication."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Vitalvet aims to provide comprehensive care for all dogs and cats within their reach, ranging from routine vaccinations to life changing dentals, general health checks and also being involved in the community for the less fortunate animals.","html":"Vitalvet aims to provide comprehensive care for all dogs and cats within their reach, ranging from routine vaccinations to life changing dentals, general health checks and also being involved in the community for the less fortunate animals."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The veterinary group believes in a “one health concept” - animal and human health are intertwined with the health of our planet. Simply put, Vitalvet works every day to achieve happy pets, happy people and a happy planet.","html":"The veterinary group believes in a “one health concept” - animal and human health are intertwined with the health of our planet. Simply put, Vitalvet works every day to achieve happy pets, happy people and a happy planet."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Dr Johann Rauch","html":"Dr Johann Rauch"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Dr Renee Perold","html":"Dr Renee Perold"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Dr Kayleigh-Jean Legge","html":"Dr Kayleigh-Jean Legge"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
